titles.title: Love Is Something That You Give It Away

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Love is something if you give it away, Give it away, give it away Love is something if you give it away, you'll end up having more.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: It's just like a magic penny, Hold it tight and you won't have any, But lend it, spend it and you'll have so many, They'll roll all over the floor!
